generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HokuyoPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for visual data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed sensor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle steering angle sensor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance HokuyoPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance VehicleSteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSteeringAngleSensor
]

instance HokuyoPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationFE
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Visual data from Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationFE
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationFE
]

instance VehicleSteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle steering angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationFE
]

instance VehicleStateAndObjectTracksDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database for storing vehicle state and object tracks as time-series data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedData, VehicleSteeringAngleData, HokuyoPointCloudData, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectingFE
]

instance DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data Translation Functional Entity handling serialization and unit conversions"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataCollectingFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data Collecting Functional Entity for storing data in SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for node lifecycle management"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for prototyping ROS2 nodes"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance Cpp : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for ROS2 nodes implementation"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance Jetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for Jetson Orin Nano programming"
    DTDFVocab:enables ROS2Middleware
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking using DBSCAN for clustering and Kalman filter for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance ACCSystemModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACC system implementing ISO 15622 control strategy"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data Monitoring for real-time visualization of vehicle state, object tracks, and driving path"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateVisualization, ObjectTracksVisualization, DrivingPathVisualization, VehicleStateReport, ObjectTracksReport
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computation Offloading for ACC system execution on the DT to reduce on-board ECU load"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCSpeedAdjustmentAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote Management for operator control of ACC (enable/disable, desired speed adjustment, emergency braking) via UI components"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCEnableDisableAction, ACCSpeedAdjustmentAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance VehicleStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization of vehicle state"
]

instance ObjectTracksVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization of object tracks"
]

instance DrivingPathVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization of projected driving path"
]

instance VehicleStateReport : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Human-readable vehicle state time-series report"
]

instance ObjectTracksReport : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Human-readable object tracks time-series report"
]

instance ACCEnableDisableAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable/disable ACC system via remote management"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ACCSpeedAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust desired speed for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Emergency braking command"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuation converting desired speed into motor voltage commands"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuation for vehicle steering control"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals from the Digital Twin Entity to the Physical Twin Entity, including desired speed commands, ACC enable/disable commands, and emergency braking instructions. These signals are converted to motor voltage commands by the Actuation FE and steering servo commands via the Physical Twin Entity's actuation components."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Network latency ≤100 ms from vehicle to DT Entity (per 3GPP 22.185 V2V specification), with clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms across all components. This ensures real-time operation for safety-critical ACC functions and event ordering in distributed systems."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Entity-based architecture with Physical Twin Entity (on-vehicle sensors/actuators), Digital Twin Entity (ACC, Data Collection, Report Generation), User Entity (3D Visualization and Control Panel UI), and cross-system Data Translation FE. Components communicate via ROS2 network internally and Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication, with data flows visualized in Fig. 2."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase for ADAS development and testing. The DT is used for real-time monitoring, computation offloading, and remote management of ACC during vehicle operation, validating compliance with ISO 15622 requirements for performance class I ACC (no road curvature capabilities)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "ACC implementation strictly follows ISO 15622 for performance class I (no road curvature capabilities). Latency and clock synchronization requirements (≤100 ms) ensure real-time safety-critical operation. Validation includes compliance testing against ISO standards and empirical measurement of system performance in the 1/10-scale vehicle testbed."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Internal component communication via ROS2 network; inter-entity communication over Wi-Fi using standardized protocols. Data Translation FE handles serialization, message type alignment, and unit conversions. Latency constraints of ≤100 ms align with 3GPP 22.185 V2V communication specifications."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity deployed on vehicle-mounted NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano. Digital Twin Entity (ACC, Data Storage) hosted on cloud/remote servers. User Entity (3D Visualization, Control Panel) runs on external devices. Data Storage uses SQL database external to the vehicle per R3 requirement."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture adapted for automotive use, ISO 15622 for ACC implementation, and 3GPP Technical Specification 22.185 for V2V communication latency requirements. The system follows ISO 23247 Part 2 entity-based structure with Functional Entities mapped to ROS2 components."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical operation enforced through strict latency (≤100 ms) and clock synchronization (≤100 ms) requirements. ACC implementation complies with ISO 15622 safety standards for vehicle control. No explicit cybersecurity measures (e.g., encryption) are detailed in the document."
]
